# awattar/claude-code-best-practices. # 🧠 Claude Code Best Practices. This repo distills best practices, patterns, and examples for integrating Claude Code into your terminal-based coding environment. ## ✨ What is Claude Code? Claude Code is a command-line tool that gives you direct access to Claude’s reasoning and coding capabilities. It’s designed for agentic coding - where Claude autonomously explores, edits, and explains code across your project. Claude Code is optimized for agentic coding - AI that acts with autonomy and awareness:. This repository includes a collection of custom slash commands designed to streamline development workflows with Claude Code. Automatically generates comprehensive CLAUDE.md files for any project by analyzing project structure, technology stack, and development patterns. Provides comprehensive help documentation for all available custom commands, including usage examples and best practices. This repository includes a collection of 10 specialized AI agents that provide domain-specific expertise across all development workflows. These agents work automatically with commands to deliver expert-level capabilities in architecture, development, and quality assurance. ## 📚 Claude Code Documentation.

# Batch Processing. Optimizes large-scale task execution through agent swarms, API batch processing, and intelligent loops to maximize efficiency and reduce costs. ### Related Skills. Manages Discord operations including messaging, reactions, and channel management directly through Claude. Automates code formatting and linting checks to ensure code quality and CI compliance before committing. Discover MCP servers that connect MCP clients like Claude and Cursor to your favorite tools. Browse the MCP Market to get started. The Batch Processing skill for Claude Code empowers developers to handle high-volume tasks—such as reviewing dozens of files or processing hundreds of documents—without linear increases in time or token costs. It provides a strategic framework for selecting the optimal execution method based on scale: utilizing agent swarms for rapid parallel processing of 5-20 items, the Anthropic API Batch for 50% cost savings on massive datasets, or sequential loops for tasks with complex dependencies. Sync skills to **Claude Cowork**, **Claude Code**, **Codex**, and more.

title: 💻 Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide: /batch Command and Headless Mode in Practice - SmartScope
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

* /batch Command: Parallel Execution of Large-Scale Code Changes. * Headless Mode (claude -p): CI/CD and Script Integration. # Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide: /batch Command and Headless Mode in Practice¶. The `/batch` command in Claude Code shines when you need to apply the same transformation across hundreds of files. * The `/batch` command executes codebase-wide migrations safely using **parallel agents + Git Worktree** isolation. * Headless mode (`claude -p`) provides **non-interactive integration** for CI/CD pipelines and shell scripts. Intermediate to advanced Claude Code users looking to scale up with large-scale changes and CI/CD integration. The latter is a non-interactive execution mode for embedding AI processing into CI/CD pipelines. | Aspect | /batch Command | Headless Mode (claude -p) |. Choose headless mode when embedding AI processing into existing CI/CD pipelines. `/batch` is a slash command executed within an interactive Claude Code session1. ## Headless Mode (claude -p): CI/CD and Script Integration¶.
